holdings.infoBox: NULC is an equity ETF with a total of 136 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.40%, Broadcom at 3.67%, Meta Platforms at 3.19%, Microsoft at 3.09%, and Advanced Micro Devices at 2.72%.

overview.description: The Nuveen ESG Large-Cap ETF (NULC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Nuveen ESG USA Large Cap index. The fund tracks a multi-factor-weighted index of large-cap companies listed on US exchanges. Holdings are screened for environmental, social, and governance criteria (ESG). NULC was launched on Jun 3, 2019 and is issued by Nuveen.
infoTable: MSCI Nuveen ESG USA Large Cap
